mapper.select:
SELECT id AS value, name AS label FROM countries
name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}

SELECT h.id AS value, h.public_id::text AS publicKey, CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(h.abbr, ''), h.code), ' - ', h.name) AS label FROM user_hospitals uh INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = uh.hospital_id WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId} AND uh.is_active = 1 AND h.is_active = 1
AND ( h.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%') OR h.code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%') OR COALESCE(h.abbr, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%') )
ORDER BY uh.is_default DESC, h.id ASC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}

SELECT m.id AS value, m.public_id::text AS publicKey, CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), 'OT'), ' - ', m.name) AS label FROM hospital_modalities hm INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = hm.modality_id WHERE hm.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND hm.is_active = 1 AND m.is_active = 1
AND m.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY m.id ASC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}

SELECT m.id AS value, m.public_id::text AS publicKey, CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), 'OT'), ' - ', m.name) AS label FROM modalities m WHERE m.is_active = 1
AND ( m.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%') OR COALESCE(m.abbr, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%') )
ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), m.name) ASC, m.name ASC, m.id ASC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}

SELECT r.id AS value, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, r.name AS label FROM roles r WHERE r.is_active = 1
AND UPPER(COALESCE(r.code, '')) <> 'USER_HOSPITAL_SCOPE_ALL'
AND r.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{filter.searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY r.name ASC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}
